title: podman inspect: output is not a JSON array
body:
`podman-inspect(1)` claims:

    By default, this will render all results in a JSON array.

Methinks this is copy-pasted from `docker-inspect`. That statement is true for docker, but not for podman.

If podman wishes to be consistent with docker-inspect, it will need to: (1) accept multiple arguments on the command line; (2) output a JSON array instead of a single element; and (3) change the example output in the man page.

If podman is to retain its current behavior, it should change the wording on the man page to reflect that it does not output an array.

comments.body: If `docker inspect` accepts multiple containers for inspection at the command line, we'll want to duplicate that behavior for `podman inspect`
I agree, @baude can  you fix this?
Ill add it to the queue
it looks like podman inspect only accepts one arg at a time ... so i will fix the output and inputs.
